text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's training time, but there's no sign of Fine
Motion. I'm searching the academy for her,
when...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Grr... I can't just ignore this news! And it's not just
Ireland that'll be affected, but every other nation
as well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Do you want to take a look? These
political articles really are fascinating, aren't
they?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, is it that time already? I-I apologize. I
totally lost track of time...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes... I was careless. I'll be more careful in future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Fine Motion has taken things to
heart. I decide not to lecture her any further.
